objects.name: Pipelock: Open-source AI agent firewall
objects.description: AI coding agents run with shell access, environment variables containing API keys, and unrestricted internet connectivity, creating a single point of failure where one compromised tool call can leak credentials to an attacker-controlled domain. Pipelock, an open-source security harness developed by Joshua Waldrep under the PipeLab project, addresses this exposure by inserting an enforcement layer between agents and the network. Version 2.3.0 shipped with class-preserving request redaction and generic SSE streaming response scanning.
